cards.title: Meta Launches AI Creator Assistant for Facebook
cards.body: Meta's new AI assistant helps creators analyze performance through natural questions like "When should I post?" Instead of parsing charts and dashboards, creators get instant insights about posting times and comment sentiment.

cards.title: Apple Previews Siri Revamp and Intelligence Updates
cards.body: Apple's WWDC 2026 conference will showcase highly anticipated updates to Siri and Apple Intelligence. Expect major announcements around the company's AI capabilities.

cards.title: Hello Robot Releases Fourth-Gen Home Assistant
cards.body: Hello Robot unveiled Stretch, its latest-generation home assistance robot. The California startup continues pushing household robotics forward.

cards.title: Apple App Store Hits $1.4 Trillion in Billings
cards.body: Apple's App Store generated $1.4 trillion in sales, up from $1.3 trillion last year, with $149 billion in digital goods sales. The platform maintains its 90% commission-free policy for most transactions.

cards.title: Lovable Expands Google Cloud Partnership Significantly
cards.body: Lovable and Google signed a multiyear deal expanding Lovable's footprint on Google Cloud by 5x. The agreement includes expanded access to Anthropic Claude.

cards.title: Alphabet Raises Record $85B for AI Business
cards.body: Alphabet completed a record-breaking $85 billion stock sale focused on Google's AI operations. The massive raise signals strong investor appetite for AI-related opportunities.

cards.title: Google Dreambeans Converts Life Into Cartoons
cards.body: Google's Dreambeans tool transforms personal data from your Google account into AI-illustrated stories. The curated list generates cartoon versions of your life moments.

cards.title: Amazon Adds AI-Generated Product Images to Search
cards.body: Amazon will display AI-generated product images matching your search queries using visual search technology. The retailer claims this helps guide users to relevant products.

cards.title: Voice AI Startup Targets Africa and Middle East
cards.body: Two founders from Goldman and Meta built a voice AI stack serving overlooked markets in Africa and the Middle East. Their platform now processes over 17,000 calls daily.

cards.title: U.K. Regulators Allow Publishers to Opt-Out AI Search
cards.body: U.K. regulators require Google provide a tool for website publishers to opt-out of generative AI search features. The option will launch in the U.K. before rolling out globally.

cards.title: Meta's WhatsApp AI Agent Goes Global
cards.body: WhatsApp's AI agent for Business is now available worldwide, charging companies based on token usage. Businesses can now leverage AI customer service at scale.

cards.title: Coralogix Raises $200M for AI Agent Monitoring
cards.body: Coralogix raised $200 million betting companies need tools to monitor and troubleshoot AI agents in production. The platform provides operational data to keep AI systems running reliably.

cards.title: Cyera Eyes $12B Valuation Despite Losses
cards.body: Cybersecurity firm Cyera is closing a $300 million round at an 80x ARR multiple, targeting $12B valuation. The funding round is led by Evolution Equity Partners.

cards.title: Uber Caps Employee AI Spending After Budget Burnout
cards.body: Uber cut employee AI spending after blowing through its budget in just four months. The company had aggressively encouraged staff to use AI tools.

cards.title: Microsoft Launches AI Behavior Testing Framework
cards.body: Microsoft released Adaptive Spec-driven Scoring for Evaluation and Regression Testing, an open source framework for AI evaluations. Developers can now spin up behavior tests using text descriptions.

cards.title: Martin Scorsese Uses AI for Film Storyboarding
cards.body: Legendary director Martin Scorsese became a prominent Hollywood voice for AI adoption. He's using the technology exclusively for storyboarding purposes.

cards.title: Microsoft Launches Scout AI Personal Assistant
cards.body: Microsoft Scout, unveiled at Build, brings OpenClaw-inspired capabilities to Microsoft 365. The new AI assistant integrates powerful functionality into the enterprise platform.

cards.title: Google Launches Fake Call Detection System
cards.body: Google rolled out fake call detection to combat AI deepfake impersonation scams. The tool protects against scammers spoofing trusted numbers and mimicking authority figures.

cards.title: Microsoft Gives Devs Better AI Agent Control
cards.body: Microsoft offers developers portable policy files to define custom rules for AI agent behavior. Compliance and security teams can now implement stricter agent controls.

cards.title: Amazon Faces Class Action Over Ring Facial Recognition
cards.body: A class action lawsuit claims Amazon's Ring Familiar Faces feature stores passerby images without consent. The suit was filed in Seattle by Virginia resident Charles Sigwalt.

cards.title: Meta launches AI creator assistant for Facebook
cards.body: Meta's new AI assistant helps creators understand their performance by answering questions like "When should I post?" and analyzing comment sentiment. Creators no longer need to manually parse through charts and dashboards.

cards.title: Apple Intelligence updates coming at WWDC 2026
cards.body: Apple's annual developer conference will showcase Siri's highly anticipated revamp and new Apple Intelligence features. Updates to AI capabilities are expected to be a major focus.

cards.title: Hello Robot releases Stretch generation four
cards.body: California startup Hello Robot unveiled the fourth-generation of its home assistance robot, Stretch. The robot aims to bring AI-powered home assistance closer to mainstream adoption.

cards.title: Lovable expands Google Cloud AI partnership
cards.body: Lovable signed a multiyear deal with Google Cloud to expand its footprint by 5x and gain expanded access to Anthropic's Claude model. The expansion signals growing demand for AI development tools.

cards.title: Alphabet raises record $85B for Google AI
cards.body: Alphabet's record-breaking $85 billion stock sale signals strong investor appetite for AI-related business opportunities. The massive raise demonstrates confidence in AI's commercial potential.

cards.title: Google's Dreambeans turns your life into cartoons
cards.body: Google launched Dreambeans, an AI tool that generates illustrated "stories" from personal data in your Google account. The tool transforms user data into AI-created cartoon narratives.

cards.title: Amazon uses AI to generate product images
cards.body: Amazon will deploy visual search and AI to show AI-generated product images matching search queries. The retailer claims the feature helps guide users to relevant products.

cards.title: Voice AI startup handles 17k daily calls
cards.body: Two former Goldman Sachs and Meta founders built a voice AI platform serving Africa and the Middle East markets. Their custom stack now processes over 17,000 calls daily.

cards.title: UK regulators force Google AI Search opt-out
cards.body: U.K. regulators require Google to offer publishers an opt-out tool for generative AI search features. The option will be tested in the U.K. before global rollout.

cards.title: Meta's WhatsApp AI agent goes global
cards.body: Meta's AI agent for WhatsApp Business is now available worldwide with token-based pricing for enterprises. Businesses pay based on token usage for AI interactions.

cards.title: Coralogix raises $200M to monitor AI agents
cards.body: Coralogix secured $200 million funding to build infrastructure for monitoring AI agents in production. The company bets that observability tools for AI systems will become essential.

cards.title: Uber limits employee AI spending after budget
cards.body: Uber capped employee AI spending after the company exhausted its budget in just four months. The cutback follows an internal push encouraging staff to maximize AI usage.

cards.title: Microsoft launches AI behavior testing framework
cards.body: Microsoft released Adaptive Spec-driven Scoring for Evaluation and Regression Testing, an open-source framework for AI evaluations. Developers can spin up AI behavior tests using text descriptions.

cards.title: Google detects AI deepfake calls to prevent scams
cards.body: Google rolled out fake call detection to protect against AI deepfake impersonation scams. Scammers increasingly use deepfake technology to spoof trusted numbers and mimic authority figures.

cards.title: Microsoft Scout brings AI assistant to Microsoft 365
cards.body: Microsoft launched Scout, a new AI assistant inspired by OpenClaw designed for Microsoft 365. Scout aims to deliver powerful AI capabilities within Microsoft's productivity ecosystem.

cards.title: Microsoft gives developers AI agent policy control
cards.body: Microsoft introduced portable policy files letting developer and security teams define custom AI agent behavior. The specification enables better control over agent compliance and security protocols.

cards.title: How courts handle flood of AI-generated lawsuits
cards.body: Federal judges increasingly encounter AI-generated legal documents from unrepresented litigants who cannot afford lawyers. Courts are struggling to manage the volume and quality of AI-drafted filings.

cards.title: Rehumanizing healthcare with agentic AI systems
cards.body: Global healthcare faces chronic underinvestment and recruitment gaps while demand surges for aging populations. Agentic AI offers potential to fill service provision gaps and improve care access.

cards.title: Small businesses leverage AI for core operations
cards.body: AI tools help small businesses handle accounting, design, market research, and product development tasks. LLMs enable small teams to access capabilities previously requiring full departments.

cards.title: Google's Gemma 4 12B runs on any laptop
cards.body: Google released Gemma 4 12B, a lightweight AI model designed to run on laptops with 16GB RAM. The model brings capable AI capabilities to consumer hardware.

cards.title: Microsoft Project Solara: Android OS for agents
cards.body: Microsoft unveiled Project Solara, an Android-based operating system designed specifically for AI agents rather than traditional apps. The OS represents Microsoft's vision for agent-first computing.

cards.title: Microsoft, Atom Computing update quantum progress
cards.body: Microsoft and Atom Computing shared progress on quantum computing capabilities. EeroQ also updated its quantum development efforts.
